 A safe place for ideas & questions

Pex is a place for thinkers. Which means that ideas and questions from our team members aren’t just welcome — they’re encouraged. We’re serious about fostering a truly inclusive and diverse space, and we welcome thoughtful suggestions and critiques.

 Badget Text

 Flexible work options

 Depending on the role, we offer in-office, hybrid, and fully remote work arrangements. Regardless of your work arrangement, we ask that you maintain at least 3 hours of daily overlap with your direct and cross-functional teammates to ensure effective collaboration.

 Let’s talk benefits (for US-based employees)

With unlimited paid time off and 10 paid holidays, you’ll have the flexibility to enjoy life beyond work. We also offer comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage with an FSA option, a 401(k) plan, and welcoming office spaces for our on-site and hybrid team members. Our benefits are thoughtfully designed to support your well-being and provide the perks that matter most.

 Vacation

We don’t limit full-time employees to a fixed number of vacation days. Instead, we offer a flexible policy that allows you to take time off, as business needs allow, without impact on your regular salary.

 Health care

US employees: 90% coverage for employees and 50% for dependents on the base plan, with dental and vision coverage available.

 Your well-being

We provide access to licensed counselors, virtual therapy sessions, and emotional support apps like Calm. Support is always just a click away.

 401k plan

Whatever your future holds, we want you to be prepared. Invest in yourself with our 401k plan.

 Grow with us

We’re committed to your professional well-being through development programs, continuing education, and leadership training. We also prioritize workplace safety, ergonomics, and a culture rooted in DEI.

 Hiring: What to expect

Fit is really important, for you and for us. That’s why our hiring process is designed to help both of us make an informed decision. We invite your candid questions. One thing you’ll notice up front: We value your time. Our goal is to get to know you and determine if Pex is a place where you can grow and help push the company forward.

 1

 1

Our recruiters will reach out to you and set up a 30 minute get-to-know-you call.

 2

 2

Next, you'll typically speak with the hiring manager to get more granular about your skills and accomplishments.

 3

 3

We'll send you a take-home challenge designed to help us understand how you approach and solve problems. Once complete, we do our best to get back to you within 3 business days.

 4

 4

The team you'd work closely with will review your challenge and if you proceed, you'll get a chance to meet with them individually.

 5

 5

We'll let you know regardless of the outcome. We won't leave you hanging!

 Open roles

 Sorry, no open roles at this time.
Don’t see a role that’s right for you? Message us at jobs@pex.com.

Read more about our hiring process on our blog. View our privacy policy.

Together we’ll create a product that helps people, organizations and brands share their stories with the world.
Prezly is a profitable, bootstrapped company fully owned by its founders. We’re a tight-knit team of doers that's growing fast, and we’re looking for smart people around the globe to help us build trailblazing software.
The Prezly team is fully remote, spread across 15 different cities around the world. Our office is in Leuven, Belgium, but everyone at Prezly is free to live and work wherever they want.ContactTiensevest 100

text: General Applications: EngineeringNot finding the perfect engineering role on our careers page?We are constantly seeking talented individuals to join our team. If you are a Software Engineer and haven’t found the perfect role on our careers page, don’t worry — you’ve come to the right place.We strongly believe that each person has something unique to bring to the table. Whether you’re a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, we’re genuinely excited to hear from you. At Prisma, we work with modern technologies, including TypeScript, to build robust and scalable solutions.If you’re interested in working with us, please send a cover letter along with your résumé. Tell us more about yourself, explain why you are interested in working at Prisma, and let us know what you aspire to do here.Once we have an open role in Engineering we will review your application to see if it fits, and we will reach out to you if it does.What is it like to work at Prisma?You're likely to be a great fit for the team if you ...... have an ownership mindset. As part of a small team, you'll have an outsize impact on decisions and the way things are executed.... stay nimble. As a growing startup, the team and strategy evolves quickly. Be ready to re-calibrate often and stay flexible.... be kind and collaborative. Come in ready to share your ideas and listen to feedback.Remote workWe are a remote-first organization, and we keep a small office in Berlin. If you're interested in relocating to Berlin, we are open to discussing relocation assistance after one year.Currently, to ensure a cohesive working environment, we are focusing on hiring remote employees within a specific timezone band. This band ranges from GMT -5 to GMT +3.What's in it for you?Opportunity to work with a world-class team of Software Engineers and build Open Source and commercial products loved by hundreds of thousands of developers worldwide.Be part of a thriving startup funded by Silicon Valley's top tier investors.We provide a competitive base salary in line with industry standards for similar positions.As an early-stage startup we also provide competitive stock-option grants with a exercise window of up to 10 years. 24 days paid vacation per year.4 mental health days per year.Fully paid parental leave up to 20 weeks.Generous tech budget to make sure you have all the hardware that you need.Ergonomic chair subsidy.Access to your local co-working space if you prefer to work from an external location to your home.[US] Health, Dental, Vision + 401k MatchingWhat is the process like?As this is posting is for general applications, we do not have a set interview process. Once we have spoken to you, we will decide on the appropriate process.How can I apply?Write us a cover letter explaining your interest in working with us, and what you would like to do if you were to work at Prisma. Once we have an open role in Engineering we will review your application to see if it fits, and we will reach out to you if it does.NOTE: To help us screen for bots, please include the phrase makedataeasy at the top of your cover letter.Prisma is an equal opportunity employer. We value and celebrate diversity and do not discriminate against any applicant on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We are committed to creating a fair and inclusive workplace where all individuals have the opportunity to contribute their skills and talents. Applicants from all backgrounds are encouraged to apply. Apply nowEngineeringRemote (Germany)Share on:Apply nowTerms of servicePrivacyCookiesPowered by Rippling

text:
Skip to content CAREERSJoin the Team APPLY NOW If you are motivated and ready to make an impact in a small team, come fast track your career at SMMILE. Big fish in small pond? Or small fish in big pond? Make your choice.Innovate. Create. Inspire.We are digital natives passionately curious about what keeps the digital world ticking, a team of problem solvers, who seek to become solution providers to our clients and partners. Grow with us and make a tangible impact on the digital trajectories of our local businesses. If you’re one to constantly ask questions and getting out of your comfort zone, then you’re at the right place.Positions AvailableGrowth Marketing InternGrowth Marketing Intern We are looking for enthusiastic marketing interns to join our Web2/3 agency and provide creative ideas to help achieve our goals. You will have administrative duties in developing and implementing marketing strategies in relation to our products and services. As a marketing intern, you will collaborate with our team in all stages of marketing campaigns. Your insightful contribution will help develop, expand and maintain our company’s brand and evolution. This internship will help you acquire marketing skills and provide you with knowledge of various marketing strategies. Ultimately, you will gain broad experience in marketing and should be prepared to enter any fast paced work environment in a disrupting industry. You have the chance to learn every day, acquire new skills and perspectives through on-the-job experiences.  Responsibilities: Collaborate with team members to plan and execute marketing campaigns for internal and external projectsCoordinate online/offline lead generation and customer-acquisition activities such as events, business partnerships, networking, promotionsHandle marketing communication tasksHelp gather and analyze competitor insights, trends, and data Requirements: Students who are currently studying Business/Marketing or Communications related fields are welcome to applyStrong interest and skills in social media marketing, digital marketing and have a creative mindsetGood analytical skillsIndependent, able to take initiative and goal-orientedEnthusiastic and curiousGood understanding of cryptocurrency and blockchain is a plusAbility to adapt to fast-paced environmentsFluent English communication skillsExcellent interpersonal, communication and presentation skillsProactive, diligent and a good team playerProficient in Microsoft OfficeMust be able to start on short notice and commit at least 3 monthsProject ExecutiveWe are looking for junior project managers enthusiastic about the digital projects like digital marketing, website, ecommerce, and business software to manage projects. As a project manager, you will collaborate with our team and our customers in all stages of their project. Your contribution is key to the success of the projects assigned to you. You will gain broad experience in digital projects and should be prepared to enter a fast paced work environment. You have the chance to learn every day, acquire new skills and perspectives through on-the-job experiences. As Project Executive, your responsibilities include: • Meeting with clients to discuss and define their needs and requirements • Developing in-depth knowledge around client’s businesses, products and services • Serve as primary day-to-day support contact for key clients • Orchestrate small to large scale projects that range from low to high complexity. • Plan, coordinate team resources and monitor projects to meet deadline, quality and budget requirements • Training customer on software usage • Assisting with company’s business growth plans Requirements The perfect fit for this role: • Self-motivated and positive individual, with a keen interest towards technology, learning and self-improvement • Equally strong interest to put into practise acquired knowledge • Highly organised, with a meticulous eye for detail and errors • Able to prioritise work and multi-task, and to work well independently and as a team • Self-disciplined with good interpersonal and communication skills, loves collaborating with people • Keep a cool head and perform well under pressure and tight deadlines • Singaporeans/PR preferred We provide on-job training and sponsor you for training course. We welcome matured candidates who are ready for a serious change in life. If you are willing to learn fast, work hard and work fast, we should talk. * No experience required (experience is a plus point but not required). * Suitable candidates will be sent for training course (6-9 month training program). Dress Code: Casual [Important] Only Singaporeans and PR will be considered.Freelance Business DeveloperThe ideal candidate is a motivated, organized, and creative individual who welcomes the challenges of acquiring and developing new business through sales efforts. You will build key customer relationships, identify business opportunities, and close business deals while maintaining an extensive knowledge of current market conditions.
To excel in this role you should have an engaging sales personality, be able to converse and negotiate business opportunities in several language (English is required), be able to research and prospect new opportunities, and possess a strong desire to chase and close new business. Responsibilities Contacting potential clients to establish a relationship and arrange meetings.Presenting and explaining our products & services to potential new clients.Attending conferences and industry events, travel to meetings.Preparing commercial proposals and contracts.Negotiating contract terms with clients and communicating terms to internal stakeholders.Researching organizations and individuals to find new opportunitiesIncreasing the value of current customers while attracting new ones.Finding and developing new markets based on research.Helping management implement sales targets.Assisting with the management of internal lead generators if requested/Becoming a subject matter expert on our business products, processes and operations, and remain up-to-date on industry news. QualificationsDiploma or above in any fieldExperience in sales, marketing or related field.Excellent written and verbal communication skills If you are willing to learn fast, work hard and work fast, we should talk.Sales Support ExecutiveResponsibilities• Followup activities– update CRM of all followup activities– call potential customer to understand their requirements– send emails to potential customer (opening email, followup email, closing email)– setup Whatsapp group chat where necessary– call potential customer to arrange sales meeting– plan and manage the schedule with sales team and partners– attend sales presentations where required– call potential cutomer to understand if they ready to buy or if they still need the product/service, when to followup again. if we lost the deal, try to understand why.* first means of followup is to call the customer. 2nd option to email and Whatsapp the customer.• Interact with in-house sales and project staff, relay and liaise customer requirements• Prepare quotation and other ad-hoc duties as assigned• Potential growth to project management role if candidate has interest in this area Requirements• Diploma or Professional Certification in Marketing, Business, Information Technology or equivalent• Min 1 year working experience in any field• Proficient in MS Office applications such as Word, Excel and PowerPoint• Diligent, good attitude and willing to learn• Highly driven, goal-oriented and independent• Able to multi-task and work in a fast paced environment• Good interpersonal and communication skills• Confident, enthusiastic and cheerful personality• Candidates with no prior experience welcome to apply• Candidate with knowledge of web design, ecommerce, software and digital marketing like SEO, social media have an added advantage Dress Code: Casual[Important] Only Singaporeans and PR will be considered.Indoor/Outdoor Sales Executive(Web, E-Commerce, Software, Online Ads / High Commission / No Exp. Welcome) Responsibilities• Develop new businesses through cold-calling (door-to-door/telemarketing)• Manage existing accounts• Generate sales in areas of web design, e-commerce, online ad sales, web hosting and other software products.• Prepare proposals and carry out presentations to prospective clients• Achieve sales and business KPIs• Follow up on leads, quotations and outstanding payment• Interact with in-house tech staff, relay and liaise specific requirements for designated projects• Proactively provide ideas and solutions towards the improvement of client sites• Other ad-hoc duties as assigned Requirements• Diploma or Professional Certification in Marketing, Business, Information Technology or equivalent• Min 1 year working experience in any field• Proficient in MS Office applications such as Word, Excel and PowerPoint• Diligent, good attitude and willing to learn• Highly driven, goal-oriented and independent• Able to multi-task and work in a fast paced environment (start-up)• Must have passion in sales and possess strong interpersonal skills• Confident, enthusiastic and cheerful personality• Candidates with no prior experience welcome to apply• Candidate with knowledge of web design, ecommerce, software and digital marketing like SEO, social media have an added advantage Dress Code: Casual[Important] Only Singaporeans and PR will be considered.SEO SpecialistRoles & ResponsibilitiesTo fuel our customers’ growth in the digital arena, we are hunting for committed, SEO specialists to join our team. If you like working in a fast-paced and highly entrepreneurial environment, and have a “whatever-it-takes” attitude towards meeting company and team goals, we want you. ResponsibilitiesDevelop, plan and implement effective SEO strategies for customers with the purpose of improving search engine organic traffic and search engine ranking.Support SEO director to execute SEO strategies and SEO implementations.Prepare SEO reports on a fortnightly and monthly basis to be shared with client and identifying areas for improvement.Use a variety of tools, competitive research and other methods to discover optimal keyword targets appropriate to the business needs of the client.Oversee SEO campaigns which encompass technical auditing and onsite SEO implementation, link outreach and content development.Work with a team of SEO specialists, content writers, campaign managers, designers, developers and sales team.Format reports and provide top-line insights for on-going performance reviews.Able to demonstrate understanding of how duplicate content and page load speed affects SEO by advising clients on best practices for successful implementation and improvement.Analyze backlinks to client and competitor sites to identify outdated links, 404s, incorrect redirects, or opportunities for competitive improvement.Demonstrate a hunger to stay abreast of the latest industry developments, and factor these into your day to day work.Understand metrics and KPIs and continually suggest optimisations to improve performanceApply, and be able to explain, SEO best practices for site navigation, bread-crumbing, internal links (including anchor text optimisation), and HTML sitemaps to client websites.Apply, and be able to explain, SEO best practices for domain, sub-domain and directory structure to client websites.Monitor clients sites regularly for crawling and indexing issues. Issues identified will be surfaced to the respective campaign manager and SEO director, documented for client communication/follow-up.Basic Criteria:Minimum of 3 years relevant, hands-on SEO experience.Experience using SEO tools.Solid knowledge of search engine spider, crawl and indexing process, while understanding the importance of XML sitemaps, robots.txt files, status code errors fix.Able to produce high quality work within a fast paced, dynamic environment.Excellent verbal and written communication skills.Has a strong familiarity with the web development process, including the important points at which SEO must be considered.Understanding of Google Analytic and Google Search Console metrics.Developing knowledge of client’s business, competition and latest industry news and trends.Effective time management skills with an ability to multitask and prioritiseStrong attention to detailAbility to present and communicate ideas in a coherent and effective mannerInterested? Please send us the following:Updated resumePortfolio with best/latest workDress Code: Casual[Important] Singaporean only.Creative DesignerRoles & ResponsibilitiesWe are a web design and development company from Singapore making the internet a more beautiful place, one website at a time. We are Smmile Web Agency. To power up our team, we are looking for committed, senior Web/Graphics/UI/UX Designers to join our team. Basic Criteria:•  Must have at least 3 years work experience in design (lesser experience can be considered if you have a good portfolio)•  Creative and up to date with the latest design trends•  Strong experience with Adobe design software•  Strong organizational skills, structured thinking and development methodology•  Detail-oriented personality•  Ability to take initiative•  Keep to deadlines, communicating clearly and consistently. Interested? Please send us the following:•  updated resume•  portfolio with best/latest workAs a senior Web/Graphics/UI/UX Designer, you are required to be strong with graphic design for print, responsive web design and UI/UX design.You should be comfortable working in a team and be proficient in English. You should not be afraid to ask questions when in doubt.You are passionate about design. You should enjoy designing graphics, products, websites, and you have a great desire to learn and keep yourself abreast with the latest design trends. Responsibilities• Use your design expertise to help our Clients visualise the design of their upcoming website/product/graphics/brand/namecard/etc• Work in a fast-paced iterative design and highly entrepreneurial development environment• Identify and communicate project risks and issues• Have a “whatever-it-takes” attitude towards meeting company and team goals• Solve complex design problems and architectural challenges Regular work would include:•  Researching and advising the best design to client’s requests•  Designing logos and namecards•  Designing brochures, web banners, social media graphics, etc•  Designing websites (mobile, desktop versions)•  Daily reports on work done•  Producing brand design documentation Skills required:• Graphics & Multimedia– Graphics Editing– Illustrator– Logo Design– Photoshop– Print Design– User Interface Design– Web page Design• Project Management– Design Project Management Dress Code: Casual[Important] Singaporean only.Senior Web DesignerBasic Criteria:• Must have at least 1-3 years work experience in web design (lesser experience can be considered if you have a good portfolio)• Creative and up to date with the latest design trends• Strong experience with Adobe design software and front-end development (HTML/CSS/Javascript)• Strong organizational skills, structured thinking and development methodology• Detail-oriented personality• Ability to take initiative• Keep to deadlines, communicating clearly and consistently.To apply, send us the following:• updated resume• portfolio with best/latest workYou should be comfortable working in a team and be proficient in English. You should not be afraid to ask questions when in doubt.You are passionate about design and web technologies. You should enjoy designing websites, have a great desire to learn and keep yourself abreast with the latest design and technology trends. Responsibilities• To design, develop and maintain web applications, as well as content management for websites• Deliver results on time with high level of quality design and coding standards.• Ad-hoc duties assigned by Manager Requirements• Diploma in IT or other related discipline with focus on web design/development• Minimum 1 year experience in developing websites (Lesser experience can be considered if you have a good portfolio)• Strong skills in HTML, JavaScript, and CSS• Good knowledge in Apache, MYSQL, PHP (Training will be provided if not proficient in this area)• Able to work independently as well as in a team environment• Excellent interpersonal, communication and documentation skills• Proficient in MS Office applications such as Word, Excel and PowerPoint• Diligent, good attitude and willing to learn• Highly driven, goal-oriented and independent• Able to multi-task and work in a fast paced environment (start-up)• Must have passion in website and software development Dress Code: Casual[Important] Singaporean only.Finance and Business AnalystFinance and Business Analyst ResponsibilitiesFinanceResponsible for managing the company financial statementsResponsible for the preparing monthly management accounts for the companyResponsible for monitoring the whole company accounting processes to ensure the accuracy and compliance meet.Business/marketing analyticsAnalyse sales data, to provides trends and insights that are helpful for marketing optimization.Build and automate insightful dashboards and self-service tools so as to make the daily operation more efficient.Build data catalogue and query documentation, so as to develop best practices for data deliverable.Assist in data migration project.Assist in ad-hoc data analysis for client projects. RequirementsGood numeracy and Excel SkillsDegree in AccountancyMin 3 years of experience in AccountingBackground in information technology, python and SQL is an advantageStrong analytical and data-driven thinkingHave a curious mind to explore the data and derive insightsStrong project management skillsSelf-driven and ability to work under limited supervisionWillingness to work in a fast paced environmentLearn fast and adapt fastInterested professionals are encouraged to send your latest resume to hr@smmile.com.Please remember to include your: current salary,  expected salary and notice period. APPLY NOW See What We’ve Been Up To Recently See works

Careers

Join the leader in low-code security automation.

View Open Positions

Why Join Swimlane

 We Are Collaborators
Swimlane values community, and our culture encourages collaboration on all levels. With regular happy hours, all-hands staff meetings and lunches, we love to learn and grow together as a team.
 We Are Innovators
Swimlane is an innovative leader in security orchestration, automation and response (SOAR). The cybersecurity world is dynamic, and we work to stay on the cutting edge of security operations.
 We Celebrate Diversity
Swimlane is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We strive to find ways to attract, develop and retain talented colleagues who represent the diverse communities in which we live and work.

Life in the Swimlane

What’s the best thing about working at Swimlane? If you ask the team, they’ll tell you it’s the people. Swimlaners are innovative, collaborative and driven by the purpose of revolutionizing the way security teams automate and respond to alerts. Headquartered in beautiful Louisville, Colorado, directly between Denver and Boulder, Swimlane’s staff spans 28 states and 16 countries!

Our Core Values

Punch Above YourWeight ClassWe make the most of our circumstances and constantly surprise and impress with our ability to deliver.

HappyInnovatorsThe hard problems are the fun problems to solve, we’re excited to take on difficult challenges and find creative solutions.

Honesty and IntegrityIn ‘all the Things’We make decisions with the best of intentions, doing what is right for as many stakeholders as possible.

Always beLeveling UpWe are continuously improving, embracing change, and consuming information to better ourselves and each other.

Move at theSpeed of WOWWe work with an extreme sense of urgency, but we never compromise quality.

Benefits and Perks

We care about our employees and are proud to offer a package of competitive benefits.

Competitive Benefits & CompensationEquity & 401k contributions, unlimited PTO and paid parental leave are just some of the benefits employees can expect.

Training & Professional DevelopmentWe invest in the future of our employees, and offer opportunities to grow professionally with regular training.

Great Company CultureWe value collaboration and innovation – and know how to have fun! Regular happy hours, trivia and on-site team building summits foster our exciting work environment.

Give-back Volunteering OpportunitiesWe encourage employees to give back to their communities. Our Colorado-based teams take advantage of volunteer days to help the local community.

Remote, Inclusive Work EnvironmentWe operate across the globe, with both hybrid and remote employees. We’re a remote-first company and ensure that both in-person and virtual employees are represented.

Laptop of Your ChoiceMac or PC? The choice is yours. Every Swimlaner can choose their preferred laptop when they join the team.

Current Job Openings

Get in Touch

Like to work at Swimlane but don’t see a position that fits you? Introduce yourself to us, and we will reach out to you if we see a position you might like.

text:
Accelerate your career with AIWork remotely with global teams at leading companies. Solve cutting-edge challenges and advance AI.Apply NowWork with top U.S. companiesWhy join Turing?Enjoy well-paid jobs with top companiesCollaborate on high-impact projects with leading companies while earning more for your expertise.Advance your career with AIEnhance your skills faster by working at the forefront of cutting-edge technology.Work remotely with global teamsControl your schedule, eliminate commutes, and collaborate with diverse teams on impactful projects.Job opportunitiesWho are we looking for?We’re looking for skilled professionals across a range of expertise who are ready to tackle complex challenges and push the boundaries of AI technology. Find your path to remote, well-paid jobs and make a global impact on technological innovation.Software developersProfessionals of all skills levels with experience building software applications and proficiency in one or more coding languages. Apply nowData scientists
& engineersProfessionals across skills levels with experience ranging from analyzing large data sets to building and deploying Machine Learning solutions.Apply nowDomain expertsProfessionals across skill levels and business functions including development, operations, marketing, HR, and sales—as well as researchers, PhDs, and industry experts.Apply nowWhat kinds of projects will you work on?Application engineeringDeploy the world’s most advanced AI systems into real-world applications like copilots, workflow automation, and knowledge bots; and translate advanced research into industry-specific use cases.AI advancementUse your industry, technical or academic expertise to help foundational AI companies improve their model’s accuracy and reasoning, deepen its understanding of complex human intelligence and iteratively enhance the performance of new math algorithms.Frequently asked questionsFind answers to common questions about finding job opportunities at TuringWhat is Turing?Turing is an AGI infrastructure company specializing in post-training large language models (LLMs) to enhance advanced reasoning, problem-solving, and cognitive tasks. Founded in 2018, Turing leverages the expertise of its globally distributed technical, business, and research experts to help Fortune 500 companies deploy customized AI solutions that transform operations and accelerate growth. As a leader in the AGI ecosystem, Turing partners with top AI labs and enterprises to deliver cutting-edge innovations in generative AI, making it a critical player in shaping the future of artificial intelligence.Why should I join Turing?Turing opens the door to remote jobs with the world’s top companies, while enabling you to work from anywhere. Our AI-powered platform matches your skills and expertise with roles that align to your career goals. Plus, you’ll have access to competitive pay and ongoing support and resources to help you thrive. Join Turing to work on cutting-edge projects using the latest technology with leading global companies.How does Turing ensure the right fit for my skills?Turing uses advanced AI matching technology to ensure that your skills and experience are perfectly aligned with the roles we offer. We carefully assess your technical abilities and professional background to match you with opportunities that maximize your potential and fit your career goals, whether you’re working on AI advancement or application engineering.How do taxes work with Turing?Taxes depend on your country of residence. As an independent contractor, you’ll be responsible for managing your tax obligations in accordance with local laws. Turing doesn’t provide VISAs, but we offer resources and guidance to help you navigate tax requirements, but it's recommended to consult with a tax professional to ensure compliance.What level English is necessary to get a job?A strong command of English is essential for working at Turing, as it’s the primary language used for communication with global teams and U.S.-based clients. You should be proficient in both written and spoken English to effectively collaborate and contribute to projects.How does Turing go beyond traditional methods for talent?Turing goes beyond traditional methods by using AI-powered matching to connect you with opportunities that align perfectly with your skills and career goals. We focus on remote roles that allow you to work with global teams on groundbreaking AI projects. Additionally, Turing provides continuous support and access to a network of top professionals, setting you up for long-term success.What level of experience is needed to qualify for opportunities?Turing caters to professionals with varying levels of technical, business, and research experience. Whether you’re an experienced software development, data scientist, engineer, business specialist, or PhD, Turing has roles that fit your expertise. The level of experience required will vary depending on the specific role.What is the application process?Find well-paid remote roles at leading U.S. companies in 4 easy steps. First create your profile. Let us get to know you and optimize your profile by providing your work history, skills, rate, and more. Once complete, start receiving personalized job recommendations for roles at U.S. companies that match your expertise and career interests. Or apply to available roles based on your skills. Complete our skill assessments and live interviews matched to your experience. Then start working with one of our high-profile clients on cutting-edge projects while enjoying seamless onboarding and continuous support from Turing.What type of remote roles does Turing offer?Turing offers a wide range of remote roles tailored to software developers, data scientists, engineers, and business specialists. These roles are available with leading U.S. companies, ensuring you’re part of a high-impact, global team.How can I get started?Getting started is easy. Select apply now to start building your profile and begin receiving personalized job recommendations. Want to accelerate your business with AI?Talk to one of our solutions architects and start innovating with AI-powered talent.Get StartedEqual Opportunity PolicyTuring is an equal opportunity employer. Turing prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type and affords equal employment opportunities to employees and applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

 Digital Marketing Careers at Uhuru

 If you’re looking for a career that is both thrilling and fulfilling and where no two days are the same, then you’re in the right place. Digital marketing careers at Uhuru offer all of that and more, including the chance to make a real difference for clients from all walks of life.

 Uhuru Careers

 Uhuru means “freedom” in Swahili.

 Work from wherever you want, and virtually whenever, with an internet connection. Create your own work schedule—we live on several different continents, so your coworkers work at different times!As long as you complete your activities, contribute to client success, hit deadlines, and show up for meetings, then feel free to work from a cafe, while traveling across the globe, or even from the beach. Some of us have kids or pets and prefer to spend much of our digital marketing careers in our PJs. Just have one goal in mind while doing so: always leave people better than you found them. This is your job to do so for clients and our job to do for YOU in return.

 “Uhuru Means FREEDOM”

 Work on your passions

 Work remotely

 Spend time with loved ones

 Ask for help

 Live the life you want...

 What’s It Like to Work at Uhuru?

 "Working for Uhuru is scrumtrulescent."

 Michele Lopez
Head of Process

 Why Uhuru

 Why Uhuru: Are You
Exceptional?

 We believe that diversity is a business’s greatest asset. Working with coworkers that come from all walks of life encourages people to challenge their way of thinking. And what better way to broaden our talent pool than by widening our search for passionate, hardworking individuals across the globe?

 Several years ago, we made the switch to become a 100 percent remote team so that our employees could create the work-life balance they want and deserve. As one of the truly remote companies out there today, our fully distributed team can set their schedules to make time for family, travel, fitness goals, and anything else that they value in their lives.

 Our Core Values
(What Matters Most to Us?)

 Our core values are the rules and boundaries that define our company’s culture and personality and provide a final “should/shouldn’t” test for everyone’s behaviors and decisions in the company. In simplest terms, it’s the soul of Uhuru. Let’s break it down so you can see what the best digital marketing careers should be like:

 Always Educate

 Here, although you will learn a lot in your first 90 days, alone—we never stop learning. Even the most senior-level experts should keep brushing up on their skills and knowledge, as times are changing, and we want everyone to be abreast of trends, so we have the best strategies for our clients. We will provide those opportunities to you for continued education because it’s important to us.

 Encourage Individual Initiatives

 As much fun as you’ll have here, we recognize it’s not your whole life. We want you to have hobbies on the side. Pick up crafting, a new sport, or anything else that fulfills your non-work passions and feel the support of the team behind you all the way.

 Hyper Communication & Clear Expectations

 Unlike other digital marketing careers, you won’t have someone breathing down your neck in a cubicle or knocking on your office door. Yet, we still highly value collaboration. We’re fully remote, so we build enough mutual trust with you that we can be confident you will regularly keep in touch with us through our various cloud-based tools—and not leave any team member hanging.We have daily team check-ins called Huddles, so it’s nearly impossible to feel stuck for long—and trust us, you won’t feel like your coworkers are strangers. We also encourage social chatter via our digital channels, not just talk about assignments—get to know one another like any traditional, in-person job!

 Good Fit

 You may be a hard worker, but if we don’t share values—or you’re not a nice person—we might not be a good match. Culture is a crucial part of how we function. It’s been proven repeatedly that any team works best when they like each other!You might be a good fit for Uhuru if you have self-initiative, like to improve continually, hyper-communicate, like working with groups, work hard to deliver your best work and results for clients, have a positive attitude, work hard and love what you do. If you’re looking for an easy marketing job, this is not the place.

 Practice What We Preach

 Actions speak louder than words, especially when it comes to digital marketing careers. See these values? We stick to them. We live by them each and every day. We don’t say things unless we really mean them. This list has been tried and tested and has resulted in better outcomes for our clients and team members alike. Each is a calculated and key piece of our overall strategy for success.

 Leave People Better Than We Found Them

 Starting to sound familiar? This is one of our all-time favorite mottos. We want to offer considerable value to every person that virtually walks through our digital doors. We are a smaller company, and we have not been around for eons. So we need to have a greater impact than the larger agencies. And we are dedicated to making a noticeable difference in the companies we work with.

 Give Them More than What They Expect

 We are not ones for doing the bare minimum. Again, we believe digital marketing careers should be about delivering exceptional value. Any opportunity we see to do so, we jump to the chance. We like our clients to know that we aren’t in the game to make money—we are here to genuinely help them grow to heights they’ve never seen before.

 Value Statement: We Value Results

 Value Statement: We Value People

 Value Statement: We Value Learning

 Uhuru’s Principles

 Uhuru is confident in its culture. We even have a Uhuru Culture Bible, which team members use to hold each other accountable.

 Principle #1: We Before Me

 We are super team-oriented. We are not a selfish clan. We see things in a “we” mentality and are proud of this mindset. Our ability to move through projects seamlessly, as a single entity, makes the quality of what we create that much stronger.

 Principle #3: Ask Questions

 No question is a bad question. The more you ask, the more you learn. We would rather you be open, honest, and inquisitive with us than stay silent and feel lost. We are here for you, so never be afraid to speak up!

 Principle #5: Work Like an Owner

 There is no room for someone to be MIA with the digital marketing careers we offer. We like to have equal weight and ownership in what we deliver for clients. This company is your baby, too, not just that of the founders’.

 Principle #7: Discuss What’s Best, Not Who’s Right

 We’re big on respect. All ideas matter, but in the end, it’s not just about us—it’s about making the client happy. Be willing and able to appreciate different perspectives.

 Principle #9: Teach What You Learn

 For digital marketing careers—or really, any job that you sincerely care about with every fiber of your being—if you learn something new, spread the knowledge. It may do the group well for others to know what you just found out, too. Plus, you’ll feel good helping your teammates grow. Once again, add value wherever possible. And lead by example! It might benefit us all, as a whole.

 Principle #11: Do the Little Things Well

 Even the little things count in digital marketing careers like these. You should be detail-oriented and be willing to follow our processes to a T to help ensure things keep on flowing. Our scrum framework is there to help us be—and stay—agile! We pride ourselves on getting a lot done for clients in less time due to the precise, proven procedures we’ve developed over the years.

 Principle #2: Bring Your Whole Self to Work

 We’re in it to win it (for our clients). Are you? Are you prepared to give your all and create your best work yet? We work hard and play hard, so if you can see yourself in that type of environment, you just might find a home at Uhuru.

 Principle #4: Tell Your Team the Truth

 Remember, we are counting on you to be a real asset to the team and be someone upon whom others can rely. Maintaining a well-functioning remote landscape requires having a team in which we can have immense confidence—and one where all members can have full faith in one another.

 Principle #6: The glass is already broken

 We always do our best at that moment. But we always expect to find a better way eventually. In essence, we know everything we are doing now is going to be replaced eventually by something else. All of our processes are already “broken.”

 Principle #8: Do Right by People

 Keep in mind, it’s your team. It’s who you’ll spend a big part of your day with, so you’ll be getting really comfortable with them. If you can’t, it simply might not work out.The ability to work so well as a cohesive unit has always been a significant driving force behind everything we do. You have a hand in helping to make work a great experience for all. It’s all about how you treat each other. There are even times we have taken our team’s side over a client’s if we truly believe it’s right in those circumstances.

 Principle #10: Recognize How to Get Beyond Disagreements

 Things should always be able to be worked out. Revisit #7 if you need a refresher of this concept. There’s no “I” in “team,” and while it’s good to stand up for yourself, be sure you’re not putting others down or leaving zero room for varying opinions. Not being agreeable will slow the work—if not making progress impossible. We are the future, so strive to move the needle forward.

 Principle #12: No Surprises

 We’re not sneaky—we are a transparent organization. When there’s company news, you’ll hear it. Be kept in the loop on all important happenings (goes with being honest! It’s not just your promise to us, it’s our commitment to you… see #4).

 Find Your Career at WebDevStudios
Here at WebDevStudios, we pride ourselves on being home to a smart, hardworking, and dedicated group of individuals, and we’re always looking to grow!

Even though we work all over the country, we’re a close and collaborative team that is passionate about building solutions that help people and organizations maximize their exposure online in the most efficient, streamlined and beautiful ways possible.

 View Open Positions

 Join our amazing company!

 Being part of WebDevStudios means more than just having a job. We strive to foster passion, creativity, innovation, and pride in what we accomplish every day. We look to our employees to show us where they really shine and put each individual’s skills and interests at the forefront of our projects.
We could not accomplish what we do daily without our employees and the wonderful jobs they perform. They are our most valuable resource. We recognize that when you love what you do, your best self-shines through.

 Oh, the benefits!

 We know the value in supporting your holistic well-being, and we make sure our benefits package reflects our commitment to our staff.

 Passion We pride ourselves in being WordPress experts and that means that we are always learning, sharing, and collaborating.
Our knowledgeable engineers, project managers, salespeople, and marketers take pride in providing our clients with premium WordPress websites, as well as innovative solutions. Our team has the drive to learn about cutting-edge web technologies, share their knowledge with one another, and apply their expertise to each project, assuring that we produce the most amazing websites, utilizing the newest systems and tools.

 Dedication We believe working with WordPress is not just about building a website for a client. We also aim to further the growth of WordPress as an application. Our band of employees takes part in Five for the Future, contributing back to WordPress in the form of core updates, plugin updates, forum assistance, and more. We encourage our teammates to volunteer in their local WordPress communities and attend WordCamps to learn and help spread knowledge.
We are working as a synergetic unit to assure that WordPress is here to stay.

 Commitment We value the talent, diversity, individualism and quirky sense of humor possessed by our employees, and fully support an open, collaborative, and dynamic environment in which our staff and the company alike can flourish.
WebDevStudios works to nurture a successful work-life balance by maintaining standard business hour expectations and include the flexibility to alter your schedule as needed. We don’t believe late-night coding sessions should be a regular thing.

 View Our Team

 Growth We recognize that self-growth strengthens teamwork and assures that we are giving our clients the best possible service.
Each WebDevStudios employee participates in weekly team check-ins, monthly lunch-and-learns, one-on-ones with leaders, Five for the Future efforts, and more. We include continuing education courses in between projects and encourage all staff members to share knowledge.
We are confident that you will find WebDevStudios a compelling and rewarding place in which to work, and we look forward to a productive and successful collaboration.

text:
Big Problems. Smart People. Wingify.

 We didn’t raise funding; we raised the bar. Wingify’s journey to $50M+ ARR was built on product obsession and our commitment to deliver real value. Join a team that doesn’t just follow trends but sets them.

 Join Our Growth

 Our Story

 Wingify’s journey began in 2009 with a bold vision: to help businesses design and optimize digital experiences. Over the years, we’ve grown from a single-product company to a highly profitable SaaS leader, creating software that powers digital success for some of the world’s most iconic brands, including Genpact, and Forbes.

 Today, over 3,000 global customers trust VWO to optimize their digital experiences, across 90+ countries. We’re a team driven by curiosity and a commitment to excellence. Every person here, from engineering to marketing, plays a vital role in shaping the future of digital optimization.

 Our mission has always been to empower businesses with the tools to create delightful online experiences. From our co-founders to the newest hire, everyone shares this bold vision. And while we’ve come far, our story is just getting started.

 Every person at Wingify, from design and engineering to sales and marketing plays a crucial role in helping us shape the future of digital experience optimization. If you’re excited by impactful software and want to work alongside passionate colleagues, Wingify is the place for you.

 What Makes Wingify Special

 It’s in the details - how we build products, how we support each other, how we handle challenges, and how we celebrate successes. Our values aren’t framed on walls, they show up in the way we work, build, challenge, support, and grow. They reflect what we stand for, what we reward, and what helps us move forward together.

 Innovation

 We’ve never been afraid to try what hasn’t been done before. From the world’s first visual A/B testing tool to async tracking scripts in browsers, we’ve built things others hadn’t imagined yet. We’re comfortable with risk, quick to experiment, and okay with getting it wrong before we get it right. That’s how we push the bar forward.

 Feedback Oriented

 We’ve grown by working with sharp people who don’t hold back their feedback, and we’re better for it. Whether it’s a nudge from a teammate or a tough customer call, we listen, reflect, and improve. We actively seek feedback from all directions, and it’s played a big role in helping us scale without external funding for over 15 years.

 Data-Driven

 We process over 3TB of data every day, and yes, we dogfood like crazy. Decisions here are driven by data, not just by gut. The world moves fast, and we rely on changing data, not on past experience. Everyone has access to data empowering everyone to take decisions, and not just your managers or leaders.

 Transparency

 We keep it real: with our wins and our misses. Our CEO shares a full monthly performance report card with the entire team - revenue, churn, margins, everything. We’re in the same boat, and we thrive on trust, transparency, and shared accountability.

 Customer Centricity

 We don’t build in a vacuum. Real problems, real feedback, real users - that’s where everything starts. Every feature, every fix, every decision is shaped by what makes life better for the people using our product.

 Collaboration

 Nothing teaches you more than working with smart people. From programs like interning in different teams to transparent project roadmaps, we encourage everyone to collaborate across teams, contribute where they’re curious, and ship together.

 Looking for a Role at Wingify?

 We’re not chasing perfect resumes or textbook answers. We’re looking for people who care about their craft, their teammates, and building something that matters.Wingify is where people come to do the most meaningful work of their careers - not because it’s easy, but because it’s worth it.

 You’ll thrive at Wingify if you:

 Love solving complex problems without waiting for instructions

 Care more about progress than process

 Ask tough questions, even if they make people uncomfortable

 Share early, iterate fast, and don’t hide half-baked ideas

 Prefer context over control and feedback over formality

 You might not enjoy Wingify if you:

 Need a playbook before making a move

 Look for someone else to take the final call

 Feel uneasy with candid feedback or fast iterations

 Prefer structure over ambiguity, or hierarchy over ownership

 Get anxious when things aren’t polished or perfectly planned

 careers@wingify.com

 Reset Filters

 We are remote-first, not remote-only

 When we started Wingify, the goal wasn’t just to build great products, it was to create a place where people are trusted to do their best work, without being watched.
 That’s why remote-first isn’t just a policy, it’s a principle. Accountability doesn’t come from an office. It comes from clarity, autonomy, and support.
 You’re free to work from wherever you feel most focused: home, a café, or one of the 700+ co-working spaces we offer. We’ll even help you set up your home workspace, because where you work should work for you.
 If you’re looking for a team that respects your time, values your space, and believes in what you bring - let’s talk.

 Perks and Benefits

 #1 International Travel and Meet-ups
 We’ve explored some incredible places together, like Thailand, Dubai, Sri Lanka, and more. Between 2011 and 2020, international trips were a big part of our journey. After a break during COVID, we brought them back in 2024, with over 350 of us heading to Thailand. More than travel, it’s about connecting and enjoying the journey together.

 #2 Comprehensive Well-being
 Taking care of yourself and those you love shouldn’t be complicated. That’s why Wingify Roshni, our mental health program, extends support to your dependents too. Our insurance plans are designed to cover both you and your family, so you’re never navigating things alone.

 #3 Generous Time Off
 Time off isn’t a reward, it’s a necessity. You’ll have the flexibility to manage your schedule, take time when you need it, and recharge through wellness leaves, quarterly long weekends, and a mandatory year-end break.

 #4 Professional Growth Funds
 Curiosity deserves support. That’s why there’s a development budget to invest in your growth - be it in your current role, emerging tech like AI, or your passion project.

 #5 Remote Work Support
 Set up your workspace the way you like it, with a home office allowance when you join. And if you ever need a change of scene, you’ll have access to co-working spaces across India, on us.

 #6 Securing Your Future
 We are dedicated to helping you build a secure future with valuable financial benefits like Gratuity, Loans, Referral Bonuses, NPS, Provident Fund, and Meal Allowances.

 #7 Celebrating Milestones
 Your journey here is something we value. Work anniversaries and key milestones are celebrated with thoughtful rewards that recognize your impact over time.

 Hear from the Team

 Rohan Shorey
 Product Success
 Joining Wingify was probably one of the most amazing experiences in my life. The opportunities and people that I've encountered during my tenure makes me feel liberated with my decision. Till date, I feel like its my first day as there is always something new to learn. The way the organisation has helped me, be it with my career, travel or even parties is difficult to explain with words. I look forward to hearing the experience you have in your own words.

 Ankit Jain
 Engineering
 Joining Wingify has been one of the most fulfilling decisions of my career. From the early days of wearing multiple hats to witnessing the growth and evolution of VWO, my journey here has been incredible. The collaborative spirit, innovative mindset, and the freedom to explore and experiment have made every day exciting. Wingify has not just been a workplace but a place where I’ve grown both personally and professionally. I can confidently say that Wingify is a place where passion meets purpose, and I am proud to be part of this amazing team.

 Jayantika Arora
 Design
 Wingify has truly been a fantastic professional home for over five years. I deeply appreciate the supportive culture and inspiring leadership, which have cultivated a genuine passion for learning and growth within me. The countless opportunities to expand my skills and knowledge through cross-functional projects and internal internships have been invaluable. Even after five years, I continue to learn and evolve, and I'm excited about what lies ahead.
